name: A Framework for Live Scoring Constructed Response Items with Commercial LLMs
venue: Artificial Intelligence in Measurement and Education Conference
summary: Framework paper for commercial LLM scoring of constructed-response items that discusses synthetic response datasets for pre-pilot validation, challenge sets, pilot validation with real student responses, and live monitoring.

access_attempts.notes: ResearchGate public full-text HTML includes the paper text and was used for synthetic pre-pilot validation extraction.
